debug_info.goal:
case cons
x : ℕ
xs : List ℕ
ih : (parts₁ xs).length = 2 ^ (xs.length - 1)
⊢ (parts₁ (x :: xs)).length = 2 ^ ((x :: xs).length - 1)

failed_attempts:
have h₁ : (parts₁ (x :: xs)).length = 2 ^ ((x :: xs).length - 1) := by
     cases xs with
     | nil =>
       simp [parts₁]
     | cons y ys =>
       simp_all [parts₁, List.length_cons, pow_succ, Nat.mul_succ]
       <;>
       (try norm_num) <;>
       (try ring_nf at *) <;>
       (try simp_all [List.map, List.cons, List.nil, List.append]) <;>
       (try norm_num) <;>
       (try ring_nf at *) <;>
       (try omega)
       <;>
       (try
         {
           cases y <;> simp_all [parts₁, List.length_cons, pow_succ, Nat.mul_succ]
           <;> norm_num <;> ring_nf at * <;> omega
         })
       <;>
       (try
         {
           cases ys <;> simp_all [parts₁, List.length_cons, pow_succ, Nat.mul_succ]
           <;> norm_num <;> ring_nf at * <;> omega
         })
   exact h₁
